title: Mappings, Sets, and Nested Data · Behavior Case: Python Dict Operations
summary: Index community resources, remove duplicates, compare inventories, and merge changed records. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python dict operations increment in a deduplicated resource inventory. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, access, update, delete, and test dictionary entries with deliberate missing-key behavior.
Estimate common sequence operation costs and measure performance before changing a correct data structure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
